title: OverNight
lyrics:
[SANTAWORLDVIEW & MiROKU「OverNight」歌詞]

[Chorus: MiROKU]
“I remember the time in my life when I thought that
It wasn’t gonna work out, Then I remember to look to the sky and
Ask why and now I know I’m gonna make it somehow
I remember the time in my life when I thought that
It wasn’t gonna work out, Yo baby don’t cry cause you know in the end
Everything’s gonna be alright”

[Verse 1: LEX]
Oh No…
U don’t want
My heart frozen like coke
I should go without my princess
テクマクマヤ Like マジック oh yeah
過ぎてった過去 擦り減った内臓
なんでさDo it 壊れていく
無気力てか感じるEmpty
一緒にいこう
雨の日も
I know you don’t want to be
一緒になる
共に笑う 共に泣き 共に生き
彼女はダミー 知ったAfter club
俺Fuckin’ dying いらないShining
フライトするパリに諭吉を換金
君がいないLifeもあり かも

[Chorus: MiROKU]
“I remember the time in my life whеn I thought that
It wasn’t gonna work out, Then I remembеr to look to the sky and
Ask why and now I know I’m gonna make it somehow
I remember the time in my life when I thought that
It wasn’t gonna work out, Yo baby don’t cry cause you know in the end
Everything’s gonna be alright”

[Verse 2: SANTAWORLDVIEW]
Now I’m higher
Burning, Makin’ Fire
They gonna retired
Money is power
The moment when you’re shining
夜にはHotelでRiding
I can’t stand Why we’re fighting？
If You want to you can find me
All day TVばっかFuck I want visa
青い海と浜辺でSangria
光る肌LingerieのSenorita
夢に見た目の前にMona Lisa
Where are did you go？
君のいないLoard
I just feel bored everyday
Yesterday is not today not the same
Goodnights are never really good nights bae

[Chorus: MiROKU]
“I remember the time in my life when I thought that
It wasn’t gonna work out, Then I remember to look to the sky and
Ask why and now I know I’m gonna make it somehow
I remember the time in my life when I thought that
It wasn’t gonna work out, Yo baby don’t cry cause you know in the end
Everything’s gonna be alright”
